name: useCamera
description: Access the device camera to take photos and record video.

name: useImagePicker
description: Pick images and videos from the device gallery or camera.
dartExample:
final file = await ImagePicker().pickImage(source: ImageSource.gallery);
if (file != null) debugPrint(file.path);

name: VideoPlayer
description: Play videos from network URLs or local files.
tsxExample: <VideoPlayer url="https://example.com/video.mp4" autoplay />
dartExample: VideoPlayer(_videoController!)

name: useVideoController
description: Imperatively control a VideoPlayer widget.
dartExample:
_videoController?.play();
_videoController?.pause();

name: useAudio
description: Play audio from URLs or local files.
tsxExample:
const audio = useAudio();
await audio.play('https://example.com/sound.mp3');
dartExample: await _audioPlayer.play(UrlSource(url));

name: CachedNetworkImage
description: Display and cache network images with placeholder support.
tsxExample: <CachedNetworkImage url="https://example.com/photo.jpg" width={200} height={200} />
dartExample: CachedNetworkImage(imageUrl: 'https://example.com/photo.jpg', width: 200, height: 200)

name: GoogleMap
description: Embed an interactive Google Map with markers and camera control.
tsxExample:
<GoogleMap
  initialLat={37.7749}
  initialLng={-122.4194}
  zoom={12}
/>
dartExample:
GoogleMap(
  initialCameraPosition: CameraPosition(
    target: LatLng(37.7749, -122.4194),
    zoom: 12,
  ),
  onMapCreated: (controller) => _mapController = controller,
)

name: useMapController
description: Imperatively control a GoogleMap widget.
tsxExample:
const map = useMapController();
map.animateTo({ lat: 48.8566, lng: 2.3522, zoom: 13 });
dartExample: _mapController?.animateCamera(CameraUpdate.newCameraPosition(CameraPosition(target: LatLng(48.8566, 2.3522), zoom: 13)))

name: useLocation
description: Track the device's GPS position in real time.
tsxExample:
const { latitude, longitude, accuracy } = useLocation();
return <Text>{latitude}, {longitude}</Text>;
dartExample:
final pos = await Geolocator.getCurrentPosition();
return Text('${pos.latitude}, ${pos.longitude}');

name: useStorage
description: Persist key-value data across app launches (shared preferences).

name: useDatabase
description: Query and mutate a local SQLite database.
tsxExample:
const db = useDatabase('app.db');
const rows = await db.query('SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?', [1]);
dartExample:
final db = await openDatabase('app.db');
final rows = await db.rawQuery('SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?', [1]);

name: useSecureStorage
description: Encrypted key-value storage backed by the OS keychain / keystore.

name: useBiometrics
description: Authenticate users with Face ID, fingerprint, or device PIN.

name: pickFile
description: Open the system file picker and return the selected file path.
tsxExample:
const file = await pickFile({ extensions: ['pdf', 'docx'] });
if (file) console.log(file.path, file.name);

name: loadAsset
description: Load a bundled app asset (text, JSON) by its asset path.
tsxExample:
const json = await loadAsset('assets/config.json');
const config = JSON.parse(json);
dartExample:
final json = await rootBundle.loadString('assets/config.json');
final config = jsonDecode(json);

name: appDir
description: Return the path to the app documents directory.
tsxExample:
const dir = await appDir();
console.log('Documents:', dir);
dartExample:
final dir = await getApplicationDocumentsDirectory();
debugPrint('Documents: ${dir.path}');

name: tempDir
description: Return the path to the temporary directory for scratch files.
tsxExample:
const tmp = await tempDir();
const cachePath = `${tmp}/image.jpg`;
dartExample:
final dir = await getTemporaryDirectory();
final cachePath = '${dir.path}/image.jpg';

name: useDeviceInfo
description: Read platform, model, OS version, and other device metadata.
tsxExample:
const { platform, model, version, isPhysicalDevice } = useDeviceInfo();
return <Text>{model} running {version}</Text>;
dartExample:
final info = await DeviceInfoPlugin().deviceInfo;
return Text('${info.data['model']} running ${info.data['version']}');

name: useConnectivity
description: Reactively track network connectivity type (wifi, mobile, none).
tsxExample:
const { isOnline, type } = useConnectivity();
if (!isOnline) return <Text>No connection</Text>;
dartExample:
final result = await Connectivity().checkConnectivity();
if (result == ConnectivityResult.none) return const Text('No connection');

name: usePermission
description: Check and request a runtime permission (camera, microphone, location…).
dartExample:
final status = await Permission.camera.status;
if (status.isDenied) await Permission.camera.request();

name: useNotifications
description: Schedule and display local push notifications.
tsxExample:
const notif = useNotifications();
await notif.show('New message', 'You have 3 unread messages');
dartExample: await _notifications.show(0, 'New message', 'You have 3 unread messages', null)

name: WebView
description: Embed a full web browser view inside your app.
tsxExample: <WebView url="https://flutter.dev" />
dartExample: WebViewWidget(controller: _webViewController)

name: useWebViewController
description: Imperatively control a WebView widget.
tsxExample:
const wvc = useWebViewController();
wvc.loadUrl('https://flutter.dev');
dartExample: _webViewController.loadRequest(Uri.parse(url))

name: launchUrl
description: Open a URL in the system browser or another external app.
tsxExample:
await launchUrl('https://flutter.dev');
await launchUrl('mailto:help@example.com');
dartExample:
await launchUrl(Uri.parse('https://flutter.dev'), mode: LaunchMode.externalApplication);
await launchUrl(Uri.parse('mailto:help@example.com'));

name: fetch
description: Make HTTP requests — a familiar fetch-style API over the http package.

name: share
description: Open the OS share sheet to share text, URLs, or files.
tsxExample: await share('Check out flutter-tsx!', subject: 'Flutter TSX');
dartExample: await Share.share('Check out flutter-tsx!', subject: 'Flutter TSX')

name: useGoogleSignIn
description: Sign in users with their Google account.
dartExample:
final account = await GoogleSignIn().signIn();
if (account != null) debugPrint('${account.email} ${account.displayName}');

name: useInAppPurchase
description: Query products and initiate in-app purchases on iOS and Android.
dartExample:
final response = await InAppPurchase.instance.queryProductDetails({'com.example.premium'});
await InAppPurchase.instance.buyNonConsumable(purchaseParam: PurchaseParam(productDetails: response.productDetails.first));

name: Router
description: Declarative URL-based navigation powered by go_router.

name: useNavigate
description: Imperatively navigate to a route using go_router.
dartExample:
context.go('/profile/42');
context.pop();

name: hapticFeedback.light
description: Trigger a light haptic impact (iOS) / tactile feedback (Android).
tsxExample: await hapticFeedback.light();
dartExample: await HapticFeedback.lightImpact();

name: hapticFeedback.medium
description: Trigger a medium haptic impact.
tsxExample: await hapticFeedback.medium();
dartExample: await HapticFeedback.mediumImpact();

name: hapticFeedback.heavy
description: Trigger a heavy haptic impact.
tsxExample: await hapticFeedback.heavy();
dartExample: await HapticFeedback.heavyImpact();

name: hapticFeedback.vibrate
description: Trigger a standard vibration.
tsxExample: await hapticFeedback.vibrate();
dartExample: await HapticFeedback.vibrate();

name: clipboard.copy
description: Copy text to the clipboard.
tsxExample: await clipboard.copy('Hello, clipboard!');
dartExample: await Clipboard.setData(const ClipboardData(text: 'Hello, clipboard!'));

name: clipboard.paste
description: Read the current clipboard contents.
tsxExample: const text = await clipboard.paste();
dartExample: final text = (await Clipboard.getData('text/plain'))?.text;

name: systemChrome.setOrientation
description: Lock the app to portrait or landscape orientation.
tsxExample: await systemChrome.setOrientation('portrait');
dartExample: await SystemChrome.setPreferredOrientations([DeviceOrientation.portraitUp]);

name: systemChrome.setStatusBarColor
description: Set the status bar background color.
tsxExample: await systemChrome.setStatusBarColor('#1a1a2e');
dartExample: SystemChrome.setSystemUIOverlayStyle(SystemUiOverlayStyle(statusBarColor: Color(0xff1a1a2e)));
